title: MineWeb
body:
# Custom Web Server Plugin for Minecraft
## Overview: 
This plugin enables Minecraft server owners to host a fully customizable website directly from their Minecraft server. It allows the serving of static files such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, making it easy to create a unique website for your server community or display custom content.

### Key Features:
- Built-in HTTP Server: Host a personalized website on the same IP as your Minecraft server, providing your players with easy access to server-related information or custom content.
- Customizable Design: Simply add your index.html, style.css, and script.js files to the plugin folder to build and style your site however you like, allowing full control over the appearance and functionality of the web page.
- Static File Hosting: Supports hosting multiple file types like images, scripts, and stylesheets, providing the flexibility to create interactive and visually appealing websites.

### Requirements:
- Basic knowledge of web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).
- A Minecraft server running Java Edition.
- An additional port is open on the host server to enable the custom web interface.
  (put the additional port on the config file)

### How to Use:
Install the plugin on your Minecraft server.
Place your index.html, style.css, and script.js files in the plugin folder.
Access the hosted website by visiting your Minecraft server's IP in a web browser.
